title: psilanthus madurensis
intro: Psilanthus madurensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is also known as the Madras wood fern or Psilanthus. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Psilanthus madurensis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to improve respiratory and digestive health. Herbal preparations of Psilanthus madurensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas and tonics for medicinal purposes.
